terrains.name: futuristic and space line to guide the space patrol
dark outer hull floor of a space station, thick reinforced steel panels, orange hazard stripe border at edge, rivets and panel seams, sci-fi ISS aesthetic, pixel art
deep space void exterior, pure black with distant star dots, no floor surface, pixel art
solid interior wall of a space station seen from directly above, thick rectangular block, dark gray brushed metal surface, faint panel lines on top face, hard edges, pixel art
deep space void exterior,pure black with a lot of star dots, no floor surface, pixel art
Cracked & Hazardous The floor is partially broken — deep cracks reveal a dark void or subfloor beneath, with caution markings worn off and bolts popped loose. Feels dangerous to walk on
Scuffed Panels A worn-down version of the clean metal floor. Scratches, dents, and faded paint lines break the uniformity. Still clearly the same material, but neglected.
